calendar.matters: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-19-2026 Continued To Jul-14-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Allen Cate appeared via zoom for Jarvis Lewis(petitioner).
William Cumming appeared via zoom for Objector.

From the outset fo the hearing the Court stated that the petiton is not ready to make a ruling on, due to procedural deficiencies.

Mr. Cate requested a brief continuance to get his papers filed. Mr. Cummings stated that he will file a counter petition for the allocation of the funds.

The matter is continued to July 14, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.



Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Bloom. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Continued To May-19-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Allan Cate for administrator Jarvis Lewis, Jr. (via Zoom).
William Cummings for assignee Asset Recovery, Inc. (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Final Distribution.

The Court stated it would not address the merits of the petition at this time, noting that procedural deficiencies remained outstanding. The Court further noted the dispute regarding the alleged assignment and advised that any such claim would need to be brought by separate petition rather than by objection alone.

The Court directed the parties to meet and confer regarding these issues.

The matter was continued to May 19, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-24-2026 Continued To Mar-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Continued To Nov-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Allan Cate appeared via zoom for Jarvis Lewis Jr. (administrator).

Mr. Cate stated that he will be filing the bond today, that the funds from the civil case needs to be transferred to Probate, and that he needs a 2-week continuance to file the final distribution.

The Court confirmed that the money has not been transferred from Housing Court to Probate. The minutes from the February 7, 2025 hearing in Housing Court stated that funds shall be transferred to Probate when the prevailing party submits an order.

The matter is continued to November 18, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Continued To Oct-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Allan Cate appeared via zoom for and with Jarvis Lewis Jr. (in person)(petitioner).

The outset of the hearing the Court set future hearing dates. The Status on Filing Proof of Bond to be filed by September 3, 2025. Petition for Final Distribution to be filed by September 30, 2025. The matter is continued to October 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Continued To Aug-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-17-2025 Continued To May-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Allan Cate for Jarvis Lewis, Jr., Administrator (via Zoom).

Shortly after the matter was called for hearing, the court's fire alarm activated, requiring a recess. As this occurred, the Court ordered the matter continued to May 7, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. No substantive discussion was able to take place before the continuance.

The Order to Show Cause was taken off calendar.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Continued To Mar-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances.

An Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause will be issued to attorney Aniela K. Szymanski to appear on March 17, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 re: the removal of the administrator and sanctions in the amount of $250 against for failure to appear. Hearing on status of closing estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Continued To Jan-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Aniela Szymanski appeared via zoom for Jarvis Lewis Jr. (administrator).

Ms. Szymanski stated that they are waiting to deposit the surplus funds from the foreclosure sale, that disbursements will be made to Mr. Lewis within 30 to 45 days, and that she is waiting for verification of assets in a 401K account. Matter is continued to January 6, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Continued To Nov-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann (former counsel for Jarvis Lewis, Jr.) appeared by zoom.
Aniela Szymanski appeared by zoom for and with Jarvis Lewis, Jr. in person.

Mrs. Szymanski stated that the substitution of attorney was originally completed on the date of the last court date, that it was delayed because she did not receive a signature from Mr. Vann, and that she also filed a substitution of attorney for Michael Donaldson, but it was rejected by the clerk because Mr. Donaldson does not appear as an attorney of record. The court thanked Mr. Vann and informed him that he has been substituted out. Mr. Vann raised the issue of his fees. Mrs. Szymanski stated that she did not come to the June 10th hearing because she did not receive notice, that she has been in communication with the mortgage trustee regarding the surplus funds, that the funds are about $350,000.00 and are the only asset of the estate, that she plans on doing final distribution when the money come in and that there is the issue of the money being released by the interpleader. Mrs. Szymanksi also provided the civil interpleader case number (CGC-23-518379). Status on close of estate is continued to November 4, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear and the order to show cause are off calendar. Mrs. Szymanski is to look into either getting a bond for her client, or depositing the money into a blocked account which can be done by way of an ex parte petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Continued To Jul-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann appeared by zoom.

Mr. Vann addressed the issue regarding the substitution not having been filed. An order to show cause is issued to Attorney Michael Donaldson and Attorney Aniela Szymanski to appear on July 1, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against each one of them for failure to appear, for failure to file a substitution of attorney and for failure to file either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of a report on status of administration. The order to show cause is also being issued to the Administrator Jarvis Lewis, Jr. to appear on July 1, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why he should not be removed for failure to appear and for failure to bring this estate to a close. Status on close of estate is also continued to July 1, 2024. The court suggested that Mr. Vann contact Mr. Lewis by telephone and advise him about the order to show cause.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Malone/Santos. Not reported.

June 12, 2024:

The status hearing and the order to show cause will be heard on July 8, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Continued To Jun-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Dennis Vann, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, Attorney of Record for Jarvis Lewis, Jr., Administrator.

Michael Donaldson, via Zoom videoconference, Esq., interested party.

Aniela Szymanski, Esq., in court, for and with Jarvis Lewis, Jr., Administrator.

At the outset, the court confirms with counsel that Ms. Szymanski shall be representing the Administrator, moving forward. Ms. Szymanski reports that she has a substitution of attorney ready to file. Ms. Szymanski is instructed to file the preceding, electronically. The court then confirms with all counsel that Messrs. Vann and Donaldson may be excused from this hearing. At the court's query, Ms. Szymanski offers a status of the estate, specifically the foreclosure sale of the estate's real property. Counsel believes that the funds from the sale might be reclaimed but it will require her to file a civil action.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jun-10-2024 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-29-2024 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Vann appeared by zoom as former counsel for Jarvis Lewis.
Janet Boessenecker appeared by zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator ("PA").

Mr. Vann stated that he was discharged by his client, that he thought Attorney Michael Donaldson substituted in and that he was shocked to find that Mr. Donaldson never subbed in. Mr. Vann also stated that he sent Mr. Donaldson the file and the signed substitution of attorney, and that he has had no recent contact with Mr. Jarvin. Mrs. Boessenecker stated that she took a look at the case this morning, that the PA is the last resort, that it looks like there is no estate, that it looks like the property was foreclosed on in August of 2023, and that equity growth management owns the property. Mrs. Boessenecker also stated that there are three other family members who have priority to act and nominate someone else, and that the PA does not have the bandwidth or the staff to clean up estates. Mr. Vann stated that it is his understanding that the property sold for $700,000.00, that $140,000.00 was owed on the property, that shortly after the foreclosure he received a notice from the other attorney, and that he suspects that Mr. Donaldson may be working with the foreclosure company in an attempt to take money out of the estate. Mr. Vann also stated that the last time Mr. Jarvin spoke with him he explained that he couldn't communicate with him because he no longer represents him, that he has a letter of termination and that Mr. Jarvin stated that he was told he had to sign that paper so that he could get the money. In addition, Mr. Vann stated that an attorney by the name of Claudine Sherron filed a request for special notice and that he does not know if she has spoken with Mr. Donaldson. The court will issue an order to appear to the administrator Jarvis Lewis and to the attorney Michael Donaldson to appear on February 14, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Discussion was held regarding which parties are to receive notice of the order to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to February 14, 2024. The court still considers Mr. Vann as counsel and Mr. Vann is authorized to contact the trustee of the sale.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-04-2023 Continued To Jan-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Dennis Vann, Esq., for Jarvis Lewis, Jr., Administrator.

At the query of the court, Mr. Vann reports that he did not expect the Examiner's notes re this matter as some time ago, he received a letter of discharge from his client and a substitution of attorney that he signed and returned to the substituting attorney. The court and Mr. Vann discuss the matter and confirm the new attorney's information. The court asks Mr. Vann to file what he has re the preceding.

The matter is continued to Jan-29-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Pliego/Singh. Not Reported.
